name: State Bank Of Scotia
description_short: State Bank of Scotia is a community bank serving Scotia, Nebraska since 1934, offering traditional banking services including account access and financial tools.
description_long:
State Bank of Scotia is a longstanding financial institution that has served the Scotia, Nebraska community for nearly 90 years, establishing itself as a local banking presence since 1934. The bank operates from a single branch location at 104 S Main Street in Scotia, NE 68875, maintaining traditional banking hours Monday through Friday from 8:00 AM to 4:30 PM, with Saturday closures.

Based on available website information, State Bank of Scotia offers core banking services including account access through their online portal, username and password authentication, and account recovery options for enrolled users. The bank provides calculators and basic financial tools on their website to assist customers with financial planning and decision-making. They maintain direct customer contact through phone support at (308) 245-4201 for account inquiries and service questions.

The bank distinguishes itself through its deep community roots and longevity in Scotia, operating as a local institution rather than a national chain. Their extended history since 1934 suggests stability and familiarity within the local market. The presence of online account access features indicates some modernization of services, though the website appears to maintain a straightforward, traditional banking presentation.

The company's website provides limited detail about specific product offerings, account types, rates, or service features beyond basic account access. Prospective customers would need direct contact with the bank to obtain information about checking accounts, savings products, CDs, loan products, or other services. The minimal digital footprint may reflect either a small operation focused on walk-in and phone-based service, or an outdated web presence that does not comprehensively showcase available offerings.
services: Online account access and login portal
pros: Nearly 90-year history serving Scotia community since 1934 demonstrates stability and local market knowledge
Online account access with login functionality provides convenient remote account management
Local branch with direct phone support (308) 245-4201 for personalized customer service
Established local presence may offer stronger community relationships than national banks
Basic financial calculators available on website to assist with financial planning
Account recovery options available for customers who forget login credentials
cons: Website provides minimal information about specific products, rates, or account types—no details on checking, savings, CDs, or loan offerings
Single branch location limits accessibility for customers outside Scotia area
Closed on Saturdays with limited weekday hours (8 AM-4:30 PM M-F), restricting access compared to banks with extended or weekend hours
No information about digital banking features, mobile apps, ATM networks, or expanded service offerings
Website lacks transparency on fees, APYs, loan products, or competitive offerings to help customers evaluate the bank
best_for: Scotia, Nebraska residents seeking local banking with personal relationships and community roots
Small business owners and farmers in the Scotia area needing community-oriented banking
Customers preferring traditional banking channels (branch visits, phone support) over digital-first banking
diagnosis: State Bank of Scotia is best for residents of Scotia, Nebraska seeking a traditional, locally-rooted banking relationship with direct community connections. The main caveat is that the website provides almost no information about specific products, rates, or services—interested customers must contact the bank directly by phone or visit the branch in person to learn about available accounts, loans, and rates.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
